_README: Source-verified ND constitutional amendments for the point-in-time history (Model 1). Applied in order by ingest_constitution_history.py after the 1889 base. text is verbatim from the authoritative session law, cross-checked against the published codes named in sources_verified. type 'new_article' appends an Amendment Article; 'amend_section' replaces an existing section's text from effective_date. Pre-1981 only; 1981+ amendments live in the modern const corpus.

amendments.heading: Lotteries prohibited
amendments.text: The legislative assembly shall have no power to authorize lotteries or gift enterprises for any purpose, and shall pass laws to prohibit the sale of lottery or gift enterprise tickets.
